summary: Complete testing of BS date system and Dashboard Accounting Summary features. All 10 test scenarios passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about hydration errors (<span> inside <option>, <tr>, <tbody>, <th>) - these are from the visual editor tool injecting span wrappers, not actual application code issues. No action needed.
BSDatePicker does not have data-testid on the wrapper div passed from parent (uses internal data-testid='bs-date-picker') - minor, but works fine for testing.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test vehicles via backend tests. Some test vehicles remain in DB from UI tests (Honda Dio UI Test - purchase date 2083 Jestha 15).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All BS date and accounting summary features are working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bs_features.py. Dashboard shows 21 Jestha 2083 BS correctly. Accounting summary has Today/This Month (BS)/This Year (BS) tabs. BSDatePicker in Add Vehicle modal shows Year/Month/Day dropdowns. Purchase dates display as BS in inventory table and vehicle detail page. Form resets on Cancel.
verified_features: BSDatePicker visible in Add Vehicle form with Year/Month/Day dropdowns (Purchase Date field) - PASS
Selecting 2083 / Jestha(2) / 15 in BSDatePicker allows form submission - PASS
Added Honda Dio UI Test with 2083 Jestha 15 as purchase date - saved successfully - PASS
Inventory table shows purchase date in BS format '2083 Jestha 15' - PASS
Dashboard shows today's BS date '21 Jestha 2083 BS' in top right - PASS
Dashboard Accounting Summary section with 3 tabs: Today, This Month (BS), This Year (BS) - PASS
Each tab loads data with correct BS period label - PASS
After adding vehicle, Total Cost in 'This Month (BS)' tab reflects purchase (Rs. 2,80,000 for 2 vehicles) - PASS
VehicleDetail page shows purchase date in BS format '2083 Jestha 15' - PASS
Form resets cleanly when Cancel is clicked (Brand = empty/Select Brand, Model = empty) - PASS
